message:
⚠️ fix: EPG validation, eac3 audio, reminders/recordings tables (#7)

* ✨ Fix guide scroll sync, quality badges, track selection UX

- Replace linked_scroll_controller with single ListView + ClipRect/OverflowBox/Transform approach
- Time ruler and programme rows scroll horizontally in sync via ListenableBuilder
- Channel names stay fixed at 200px, never shift horizontally
- Add quality badges (UHD/FHD/HD/SD) extracted from channel names
- Fix track select button layout jump: always show fixed-width Active/Select widget
- Add media_kit import to debug dialog for Tracks type
- Pass mappedEpgId to ChannelDebugDialog from both callers
- Remove linked_scroll_controller dependency from pubspec
- Configure PlayerService with MPVLogLevel.warn and volume 100

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* ⚠️ fix: EPG validation, eac3 audio, reminders/recordings tables

- Validate tvgId against actual EPG channel IDs before mapping
- Add periodic now-playing refresh (60s timer)
- Configure mpv for eac3/ac3 audio (ad=*, audio-channels=stereo)
- Add EpgReminders and ScheduledRecordings drift tables (schema v3)
- Regenerate drift codegen for new tables

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
